source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage/Crane Incident

event.summary: While attempting to insert a spear into 7 inch casing, a Toolhand from Eaton was shaking a 3.5 inch workstring in circular motion. The Injured Person stepped up to assist by placing his hands on the pipe. Hydraulic power tongs positioned 6-10 inches away contacted the pipe during circular motion, catching the tip of the IP's middle finger between the pipe and tongs.
recommendations: Improve Job Safety Analysis (JSA) to identify all hazards associated with job task steps
Ensure JSA encompasses multi-person work scenarios
Improve communication between all personnel involved in job tasks
Ensure equipment positioning does not create at-risk conditions during multi-worker tasks
key_phrases: finger caught between pipe and tongs
JSA did not encompass two persons working in tandem

hazards.name: Hydraulic power tongs in close proximity to work area

threats.name: Inadequate equipment positioning relative to personnel work area
Failure to recognize multi-worker hazards in JSA
Lack of communication between workers during tandem task

consequences.name: Hand crush injury - finger caught between pipe and tongs

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA)
controls.barrier_role: Identify and mitigate hazards associated with job tasks

supporting_text: The JSA did not encompass two persons working in tandem to rotate the pipe
Lessee failed to ensure the JSA (submitted to BSEE) was properly written with all task steps, potential hazards, and hazard controls

During the incident investigation, it was discovered the Job Safety Analysis (JSA) submitted to BSEE Inspectors failed to identify, specify, and mitigate all hazards associated with the job task steps

controls.name: Equipment positioning and spacing standards
controls.barrier_role: Maintain safe distance between power tongs and personnel work area

supporting_text: The hydraulic power tongs was positioned about 6-10 inches away from the drill pipe
Lessee failed to recognize and mitigate the hazards of other equipment(power tongs) which was in work area approximately 6 inches from drill pipe while it was being rotated

controls.name: Worker communication and coordination procedures
controls.barrier_role: Ensure all personnel understand task requirements and hazards

supporting_text: Lessee failed to ensure good communication between all personnel involved in the job task
Both workers failed to recognize and adequately assess the risk associated with this specific piece of equipment in such close proximity to the type of physical task being performed

controls.name: Hazard recognition and risk assessment
controls.barrier_role: Identify at-risk conditions before work commences

supporting_text: Though its position was not considered to be an at-risk condition while the Eaton worker performed his work alone, it did become so when two-workers attempt to move the pipe in tandem with it in such close proximity
Both workers failed to recognize and adequately assess the risk associated with this specific piece of equipment in such close proximity to the type of physical task being performed

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
